calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Machado for (administrator) John Fitzpatrick.

The Court asked counsel to provide further argument to support the preliminary distribution. Mr. Machado stated that it was fairly straightforward, that the administrator and his children (beneficiaries) became concerned regarding the ability to wrap everything up before the end of the year, that they were all in agreement to a distribution for tax purposes, that it would be detrimental to the estate and beneficiaries not to distribute, that they cited a rule in their declaration and that the plans fit the spirit of the provision although there are some ambiguities, that all of the beneficiaries consented, that it was in the best interest of everyone involved and that to get a court order would have added expense and time. Mr. Machado stated that in regards to extraordinary fees they took this action outside of the ordinary course and that the legal fees exceeded the statutory limitations. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
